title: Keyword Extraction Output
description: Output format for the F4 keyword extractor. Represents the result of extracting hard (technical) and soft (behavioral) keywords from a job description, along with seniority signals and extraction metadata.

hardKeywords.description: Technical/hard keywords extracted from the job description. Each entry includes the matched term, its taxonomy category, and match confidence.

softKeywords.description: Soft/behavioral keywords extracted from the job description (e.g. 'leadership', 'stakeholder management', 'cross-functional collaboration').

senioritySignals.description: Signals extracted from the JD that indicate expected seniority level.

metadata.description: Metadata about the extraction process itself (timing, source, taxonomy version, etc.).

hardKeyword.description: A technical/hard keyword matched against the taxonomy. Represents a skill, tool, language, framework, cloud service, or database found in the JD text.

term.description: The canonical keyword term from the taxonomy (e.g. 'Kubernetes', not 'K8s'). Always in English.

category.description: The taxonomy category this keyword belongs to.

matched.description: The actual text that triggered the match in the JD (e.g. 'K8s' matched against variant mapping → term 'Kubernetes').

confidence.description: Confidence score for the match (0.0 to 1.0). 1.0 = exact taxonomy match. Lower values = fuzzy or semantic match.

frequency.description: Number of times this keyword (or its variants) appeared in the JD text.

mustHave.description: Whether this keyword appears in the must-have/requirements section (true) vs nice-to-have/preferred section (false).

context.description: A short excerpt from the JD showing the keyword in context (up to ~100 chars).

softKeyword.description: A soft/behavioral keyword extracted from the JD. Represents interpersonal, leadership, or communication skills.

term.description: The canonical soft skill term (e.g. 'Stakeholder Management', 'Cross-Functional Collaboration').

matched.description: The actual text that triggered the match in the JD.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the match (0.0 to 1.0).

frequency.description: Number of times this soft skill appeared in the JD text.

mustHave.description: Whether this appears in the must-have section.

context.description: A short excerpt from the JD showing the keyword in context.

senioritySignals.description: Indicators extracted from the JD about the expected seniority level of the role.

yearsMinimum.description: Minimum years of experience explicitly stated in the JD. 0 if not stated.

yearsPreferred.description: Preferred years of experience. 0 if not stated.

level.description: Inferred seniority level based on title, years, and JD language.

signals.description: The specific text signals from the JD that informed the seniority level inference.

title.description: The role title as extracted from the JD (e.g. 'Senior Technical Program Manager').

senioritySignal.description: A single signal that contributed to the seniority inference.

type.description: Category of the signal. 'years_explicit' = explicit 'X+ years' phrase; 'title_keyword' = seniority keyword in role title; 'scope' = organizational scope language; 'team_lead' = team leadership mention; 'strategy' = strategic planning mention; 'mentorship' = mentoring mention; 'budget' = budget/P&L ownership; 'stakeholder' = stakeholder management scope.

value.description: The extracted value or matched text. For 'years_explicit', the number of years (e.g. '5'). For other types, the relevant snippet.

extractionMetadata.description: Metadata about the keyword extraction process for audit, reproducibility, and debugging.

extractedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when extraction was performed.

taxonomyVersion.description: Version of the keyword taxonomy used (from keyword-taxonomy.json).

jdSource.description: How the JD was provided: via URL scraping, plain text paste, or file upload.

jdUrl.description: The original JD URL if jdSource is 'url'.

jdWordCount.description: Word count of the JD text after cleanup (for stats/debugging).

processingTimeMs.description: Time taken to run extraction in milliseconds.

extractorVersion.description: Version of the extractor module itself (e.g. '1.0.0').
